Delphine Dumont

Person · First seen 3307-09-17 · 4 mentions
Active: 3307-09-17 → 3309-12-15
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3309-12-15
Help Harksing’s Gifts Reach Recipients
Eccentric inventor Harald Harksing's gift-delivery database is corrupted, preventing his latest batch of custom inventions from reaching their celebrity recipients.
3307-10-04
Ambassador Condemns Entrapment of Yuri Grom
The Federal Diplomatic Corps officially denounces President Hudson's attempt to capture Yuri Grom in Delta Pavonis, with Ambassador Delphine Dumont offering personal apologies.
3307-09-24
Progress Between Federation and Yuri Grom
Negotiations between the Federation and Yuri Grom in Delta Pavonis show unexpected mutual respect, with a potential deal for trade ties while maintaining independence.
3307-09-17
Delta Pavonis Hosts Political Conference
The Federation and dictator Yuri Grom hold a diplomatic conference in Delta Pavonis to determine the system's allegiance, marking the first official engagement between the two.
